## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Environment

- **OS**: (e.g., macOS 14.2, Ubuntu 22.04)
- **Go version**: (output of `go version`)
- **Tool version**: (output of `stripe-payout-reconciler --version`, or commit hash)

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `stripe-payout-reconciler payout ...`
2. ...

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include the full error output if applicable.

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information.

> **Important**: Never include real API keys, tokens, or other credentials in bug reports. Use placeholder values like `sk_test_XXXX...`.
